mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.devicename AS export_devicename, d.datatablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dt.id IN (3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0 AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.devicename AS export_devicename, d.datatablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dt.id = 1 AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id WHERE dt.id IN(4,6) AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.view_tablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id WHERE dt.id IN(1,4,6) AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0
mapper.sql:
( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NOT NULL AND
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
= AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFMONTH(LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFYEAR(LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
)

choose.otherwise:
SELECT categories_time, IF( #{totalMeter} > 0, CAST(
AS DECIMAL ), CAST(
AS DECIMAL ) ) AS energy, ROUND(nvm_irradiance, 1) AS irradiance FROM ( SELECT d.id, d.id_device_type, s.dc_capacity, s.interval_energy_threshold, s.minimum_energy_value, sdr.time,
DATE_FORMAT( sdr.time, '%m/%d/%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( sdr.time, '%m/%d' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( sdr.time, '%m/%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( sdr.time, '%b-%Y' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( sdr.time, '%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( sdr.time, '%Y' ) AS categories_time,
IF( (dpf2.min_value IS NOT NULL AND < dpf2.min_value) OR (dpf2.max_value IS NOT NULL AND > dpf2.max_value), NULL,
) AS meterEnergy, IF( (dpf2.min_value IS NOT NULL AND < dpf2.min_value) OR (dpf2.max_value IS NOT NULL AND > dpf2.max_value), NULL,
) AS inverterEnergy, AVG(IF(d.id_device_type IN (4,6), sdr.POAAVG, NULL)) AS nvm_irradiance FROM ${table_data_report} sdr LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = sdr.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp1 ON dp1.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND dp1.is_active_power = 1 LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf1 ON dp1.id = dpf1.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf1.id_device AND (dpf1.min_value IS NOT NULL OR dpf1.max_value IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp2 ON dp2.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND dp2.is_user_defined = 1 AND dp2.is_energy = 1 LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf2 ON dp2.id = dpf2.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf2.id_device AND (dpf2.min_value IS NOT NULL OR dpf2.max_value IS NOT NULL) WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND SHA1( d.id_site ) = #{hash_id} AND (d.meter_type = 3 OR d.meter_type IS NULL) AND (sdr.time BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}) GROUP BY d.id, time_format ) t GROUP BY time_format

mapper.select:
SELECT AS time_format, AS categories_time, AS hour_time, dv.id_device, CAST(
m.`value`
AS DECIMAL ) AS energy FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN ( SELECT AS leadTimeValid, MIN(dv.time) AS minTime, MAX(dv.time) AS maxTime,
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance)
AVG(dv.nvmActivePower)
NULL
AS `value` FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND d.id = #{id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND dv.error = 0 GROUP BY
) m ON m.minTime = dv.time AND dv.id_device = #{id}

SELECT
hour_time,
categories_time, CAST(SUM(nvmActiveEnergy) AS DECIMAL) AS energy, ROUND(AVG(nvm_irradiance), 1) AS irradiance FROM ( SELECT
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%m/%d/%Y %H:00' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%H:00' ) AS hour_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%m/%d' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%b-%Y' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y' ) AS categories_time,
SUM(dv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS nvmActiveEnergy, AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) AS nvm_irradiance FROM ${table_data_virtual} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.id = #{id} AND d.id_device_type = 12 AND (CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}) AND s.`status` = 1 AND d.`status` = 1 GROUP BY time_format ) t GROUP BY categories_time
SELECT SHA1(id) as hash_id, id FROM site WHERE id_company = #{id_company} AND is_delete = 0 AND `status` = 1 AND kiosk_view = 1 ORDER BY `name`, id_company ASC;
SELECT id_company FROM site WHERE SHA1(id) = #{hash_id}
